mirrorPolicy: Local is primary; AWS cloud URLs are mirrors and must not create separate dashboards. No AWS URL is verified until /, /api/health, and /api/cloud-mirrors pass.

awsRuntime.target: ECS Fargate or compatible AWS container service

appServices.name: Lantern Trade Chat
appServices.provider: AWS App Runner (compatible AWS container service)
appServices.note: Distinct trading app, not a dashboard mirror. /api/cloud-mirrors is N/A for this service; verification gate is / and /api/health.

retiredMirrors.name: Lantern OS Render
retiredMirrors.reason: Live route returned HTTP 404 for /, /api/health, and /demo-1000.html; operator requested Render be gutted.

retiredMirrors.name: HFF Render
retiredMirrors.reason: Removed from Lantern cloud mirror truth board to avoid onrender dependency split-brain.
